title: ScenarioManifest
description: The scenario CATALOG index = the human-authored staging list at datasets/templates/manifest.json. Build-time authoring input consumed by the generator. Mirrors tools/corpus.py ScenarioManifest. The generator rotates the daily bank over status=='live' scenarios only (a stable hash of the date over the sorted live ids); a 'build' scenario is authorable + testable via `generate.py --scenario <id>` but stays OUT of the live rotation. tone/kind are free-form editorial tags; file == '<id>.json'; the loader additionally checks every listed file exists and every template on disk (except this manifest) is listed.

evolution.change: Initial ScenarioManifest v1: schemaVersion, scenarios[ScenarioManifestEntry{id,file,title,tone,kind,status(live|build)}], note?. Replaces the directory-scan scenario picker with a metadata-carrying manifest that gates the daily rotation on status=='live' and enables build/live staging.
evolution.why: Story-first pivot needs a staged, tone/kind-tagged catalog so new scenario templates can be authored + tested via --scenario without touching the served daily bank; typed before logic (CLAUDE.md sec 11).

evolution.change: Add optional per-entry `verifiedSha` (string): the content-address at which the scenario last passed full multi-tier verification, written by tools/verify_scenarios.py --stamp. Additive + backwards-compatible (absent == never verified); mirrored in tools/corpus.py ScenarioManifestEntry.
evolution.why: Content-addressed build cache: the incremental verifier skips a scenario whose verifiedSha matches its current fingerprint, so CI verifies only CHANGED scenarios (bounded regardless of catalog size) - lets the catalog scale to ~100 scenarios without CI bloat.

verifiedSha.description: Optional build-cache stamp: the scenario_fingerprint (sha256 hex) at which this scenario last passed full multi-tier verification. Written by tools/verify_scenarios.py --stamp; when it matches the current fingerprint the incremental check skips re-verifying this scenario. Absent == never verified.
